channel.title: Investing on Knowledge Base
channel.description: Recent content in Investing on Knowledge Base

item.title: KNSL: Why Kinsale Capital Is the Best Underwriter in America
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: A deep dive into Kinsale Capital Group — the pure-play E&S insurer with a 75.9% combined ratio, 29% ROE, and a structural cost moat that peers cannot replicate.

item.title: 🌍 What Multi-Bagger Companies Taught Us
item.author: shrijit@umich.edu (Shrijit Patel)
item.description: Explore the top multibagger companies of the last decade and uncover key insights for successful investing strategies.
